input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.3.3
            TITLE: tractive system wiring must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.3.3: Tractive System wiring must be:
EV.6.3.3 Tractive System wiring must be: 
a. Done to professional standards with sufficient strain relief  
b. Protected from loosening due to vibration  
c. Protected against damage by rotating and / or moving parts
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 98 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
d. Located out of the way of possible snagging or damage

final_answer: Tractive System wiring must be: a. Done to professional standards with sufficient strain relief b. Protected from loosening due to vibration c. Protected against damage by rotating and / or moving parts d. Located out of the way of possible snagging or damage
